description_long: This is a cylindrical, red postbox mounted on a round, gray stone base. The front features a prominent circular mail slot area with a decorative gold panel, above which are intricate patterns and below which are Chinese characters and the word 'POST'. A rectangular access door with a small handle and a mail collection slot is located beneath the main posting aperture. The top of the postbox is capped with a domed lid featuring a small knob. The sides and rear are plain, with the cylindrical body uninterrupted except for the base and top detailing. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, with clear East Asian stylistic influences.
description: A red cylindrical postbox with a decorative gold mail slot and Chinese characters, mounted on a round stone base. The front features a posting aperture, access door, and ornate detailing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gold mail slot, Chinese characters, 'POST' label, and rectangular access door on the red cylindrical body.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the cylindrical shape, domed top, and the protruding mail slot area, with the stone base visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, uninterrupted cylindrical back and the full round stone base.
description_view_3: Angled side view highlighting the protruding mail slot area and the transition between the postbox and the stone base.
attribute_mail_slot_location: centered on the upper front face, just below the decorative gold panel
attribute_collection_times_panel: rectangular panel below the mail slot, integrated into the access door
attribute_postal_service_logo: no visible logo, but Chinese characters and the word 'POST' are present on the front
attribute_door_or_access_panel: rectangular access door on the lower front, beneath the mail slot
attribute_posting_aperture_design: circular mail slot with a decorative gold panel and intricate patterning
